## Pi Harness Development

When planning, exploring, or implementing changes to the `pi` agent harness (anything within `~/.pi/agent/` or related core logic), you MUST consult the `pi-expert` agent. Do not make assumptions about the harness architecture or API; use the `pi-expert` to verify the correct approach, lifecycle events, and configuration options before proceeding with any edits.

**Mandatory:** Always refer to [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) for complete guidance about this workspace.
